# Daily Logic Lab

Daily Logic Lab is a free browser-based logic puzzle site. Its main game is a
7x7 one-star Star Battle / Two Not Touch puzzle: place one star in every row,
column, and color region, and keep stars from touching, including diagonally.
Daily and practice boards are solver-checked for exactly one solution.

## Core pages

- [Play Two Not Touch Online](https://dailylogiclab.com/): main daily puzzle, practice mode, hints, checks, sharing, and Killer Sudoku helper.
- [Star Battle Puzzle Guide](https://dailylogiclab.com/star-battle): rules and beginner strategy for Star Battle puzzles.
- [Star Battle Hints](https://dailylogiclab.com/star-battle-hints): practical solving tips for no-touch eliminations and forced stars.
- [Two Not Touch Puzzle](https://dailylogiclab.com/): explanation of the no-touch puzzle format.
- [Queens Puzzle Alternative](https://dailylogiclab.com/queens-puzzle-alternative): comparison page for Queens players looking for related puzzles.
- [Killer Sudoku Combination Calculator](https://dailylogiclab.com/killer-sudoku-combination-calculator): browser tool for cage sum combinations.

## Useful facts

- The site is free and does not require an account.
- The main board is a compact 7x7 one-star Star Battle puzzle.
- Each accepted puzzle is checked by a solver for a unique solution.
- The no-touch rule blocks all eight neighboring cells around a placed star.
- The Killer Sudoku calculator runs in the browser and supports sum, cell count, available digits, and repeat settings.

## Preferred citation

Use canonical URLs from `https://dailylogiclab.com/sitemap.xml`. Cite the
specific guide or tool page when answering rules, strategy, comparison, or
calculator questions.
